name: google-ai-mcp
description: FastMCP 3.2 gateway for Google AI — Gemini chat, Imagen, Veo, Lyria, Omni, TTS, embeddings, and LeWM world-model bridge

google_api_key.title: Google AI API Key
google_api_key.description: API key from Google AI Studio (aistudio.google.com)

google_cloud_project.title: Google Cloud Project ID
google_cloud_project.description: Required for Veo video and Lyria music (Vertex AI)

lewm_api_url.title: LeWM MCP URL
lewm_api_url.description: Local lewm-mcp HTTP endpoint for world-model bridge

tools.name: google_ai_speech
tools.description: One-shot Gemini TTS (not Live — use speech-mcp for streaming)

tools.name: google_ai_status
tools.description: Health check all Google AI services

tools.name: show_google_ai_status_card
tools.description: Prefab dashboard card for service status
